title: Related Templates Shortcode for DataTools WordPress Site
story: As a DataTools Pro user browsing the website, I want to see related templates in the sidebar based on shared tags, so that I can discover relevant templates without manually searching.
description:
The DataTools WordPress site uses a custom post type for Templates. Currently there may be existing code that displays related content, but it needs to be replaced with a more controllable approach.

### Requirements
- Create a custom WordPress shortcode that displays all template posts sharing the same tag as the current template.
- The shortcode should be placeable in the sidebar widget manager, giving control over where related templates appear.
- Review any existing related-content code in the template and replace it with the new shortcode-based approach.
acceptance_criteria: A custom WordPress shortcode exists that renders related template posts based on shared tags
The shortcode can be placed in the sidebar widget manager
Related templates are filtered by matching tags from the current template post
The shortcode renders a clean list of related template links
Existing related-content code is reviewed and replaced by the new shortcode
ux_changes: Adds a related templates widget in the sidebar that dynamically shows other template posts with matching tags. Displayed as a list of clickable links.
middleware_changes: Custom WordPress shortcode registered in PHP that queries template posts by tag taxonomy, excludes the current post, and renders a formatted list.
implementation_notes: The shortcode leverages WordPress's existing tag taxonomy on the custom Templates post type. Placed via the widget manager for admin-level control over sidebar layout.
